backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining customer, job, and appointment management with access control, including CRUD operations for customers, jobs, appointments, and user profiles with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: navigation menu additions, dashboard page with revenue insights, social media management page with multiple components, and routing configuration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Phoenix Shield mold removal business application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining earth-tone design tokens for light and dark modes including sidebar, chart, and UI component variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Phoenix Shield Mold Removal Business App with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component with TanStack Router configuration defining routes for customers, calendar, jobs, dashboard, and social media pages with protected authentication layout and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button component using Internet Identity with loading states, error handling, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup that appears after authentication, requiring name input before accessing the application.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Appoint: Modal dialog displaying appointment details including customer name, date, time, duration, and job type with icon-based layout.

Dialog form component for creating appointments with fields for customer selection, date/time, job type, and duration. Handles form state, validation, and converts date/time to BigInt timestamps for submission.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Monthly: Monthly calendar view component that displays appointments on their scheduled dates with navigation controls. Shows up to 2 appointments per day with overflow indicator and supports clicking dates to add appointments or clicking appointments to view details.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: Card component displaying customer summary information including name, contact details (phone, email, address), and job history count. Clickable card with hover effects and chevron icon.
Dialog form component for creating or editing customers with fields for name, phone, email, and physical address. Supports both add and edit modes with loading states.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobCard.tsx: Card component displaying job details including service type, date, customer, status badge, and issues found. Includes inline status update dropdown that triggers mutation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobHistoryT: Timeline component displaying a customer's job history sorted by date in descending order. Shows loading skeleton, empty state, or list of job cards with service details and status badges.
frontend/src/components/jobs/JobStatusBa: Badge component that displays job status with color-coded styling for completed (green), in progress (amber), and scheduled (stone) states.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu for Customers, Calendar, Jobs, Dashboard, and Social Media pages, plus user profile display and login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper component that renders the Header, main content area, and footer with branding attribution to caffeine.ai and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/social/ContentCa: Monthly calendar view component displaying scheduled social media posts with day grid, post badges, and highlighting for the current day.
frontend/src/components/social/PostGener: AI-powered social media post generator with inputs for topic, tone (professional/friendly/urgent), and platform (Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn/Twitter), generating templated content based on selections.
frontend/src/components/social/PostPrevi: Editable preview component for generated social media posts with character count, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and mock platform preview showing how the post will appear.
frontend/src/components/social/TemplateL: Library of pre-written social media post templates organized by category (Before/After, Prevention Tips, Testimonials, Emergency Response, Seasonal Content) with selection callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous/authenticated states and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, customers, jobs, and appointments with CRUD operations and automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom earth-tone color palette using CSS variables for light and dark modes, including primary (warm green), secondary (warm brown), and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Calendar view page displaying monthly appointments with interactive date selection, appointment creation form, and appointment details modal using custom calendar components.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDetailPage.ts: Customer detail page showing contact information card and job history timeline, with navigation back to customers list and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Customer list page displaying customer cards in a grid layout with add customer functionality, empty state handling, and navigation to individual customer details.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays business dashboard with monthly revenue metrics including total revenue, completed jobs count, and average job value calculated from completed jobs using a fixed $2500 estimate per job.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Renders a tabbed interface for viewing and filtering jobs by status (all, scheduled, in-progress, completed) with job cards displayed in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with hero background image, Phoenix Shield branding, and login button for Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMediaPage.tsx: Tabbed interface for social media management with AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and post preview components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, typography plugin, animations, and design tokens for the UI component library.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Phoenix Shield as a mold removal business management app with customer database, job tracking, scheduling, estimates, photo galleries, and AI-powered social media features.
